feed.title: SkillsLLM & the MCP / Claude Skills ecosystem

author.name: SkillsLLM & the MCP / Claude Skills ecosystem

feed.subtitle: AI tooling news and guides: SkillsLLM, Desktop Commander, Model Context Protocol, FastMCP, ClaudePluginHub, MCP Servers blog, Claude Skills Hub, and Glama (blog + release notes)

entry.title: dbs-spread
entry.content: 传播心理解码。给定一段内容，用 5 个经典传播学理论解码它为什么能引起受众共鸣，分析受众情绪底层和有效立场，输出聊天室的讨论方向。

entry.title: silver-bullet
entry.content: Agentic Process Orchestrator for AI-native Software Engineering & DevOps. Provides SB-owned lifecycle workflows, optional extension-plugin boundaries, and layered technical compliance.

entry.title: my-mac-claude
entry.content: Combined Claude skills library for macOS: Anthropic examples, Superpowers workflows, Matt Pocock skills, gstack browser-testing, and token-efficient profiles

entry.title: infinitecampus-mcp
entry.content: Infinite Campus (Campus Parent) MCP server for Claude — grades, attendance, assignments, messages, and documents

entry.title: booping
entry.content: Per-project grooming, implementation, retrospective, and lessons workflow with mandatory sub-agent delegation

entry.title: crawlie
entry.content: Run fast technical-SEO and AI-search (GEO) audits from your agent. Bundles the crawlie MCP server (auto-installed via npx) plus skills for full-site audits, broken-link fixes, pre-launch gates, and GEO readiness.

entry.title: essentials
entry.content: Codebase-agnostic code-review and quality primitives: security, logic, performance, lint, dead-code, dependency, copy, UI, migration, route, webhook, docs, and test agents; an orchestrated /code-review; git commit/PR helpers; evidence-first triage skills; and a /first-run profile that tailors them all to your stack. Stack-detecting — works on any language or framework.

entry.title: 1ai-skills
entry.content: 1320 production-ready AI agent skills — cybersecurity, SEO, trading, marketing, automation, devops, content, financial services, and more

entry.title: redteam
entry.content: Adversarial agent-pair harness: one model writes code (plan → implement), a second model reviews it adversarially; the draft PR is the human checkpoint before merge (a single-model test-first TDD mode is also available).

entry.title: obsidian
entry.content: Create and edit Obsidian vault files including Markdown, Bases, and Canvas. Use when working with .md, .base, or .canvas files in an Obsidian vault.

entry.title: trace-my-code
entry.content: An agent skill that makes your coding agent fluent in your codebase. A living trace of domain, architecture, and patterns it reads before building — so features fit and nothing gets rebuilt.

entry.title: dma
entry.content: Multi-agent Jira/Linear delivery system: team-lead, dev, qa, reviewer, devops, architect, and the sentinel meta-agent, with handoff/run orchestration and permission-guard hooks.

entry.title: cogpin
entry.content: Ungameable Definition-of-Done gate for AI coding agents. Denies --no-verify / secret-leaks in real time (PreToolUse), enforces the full closing-discipline as base-pinned diff facts at pre-push/CI.

entry.title: atlas-workflow-orchestrator
entry.content: Orquestra pipelines de desenvolvimento de features no Atlas (PRD, validação, entrevista, plano, execução, repair, review), auditoria universal e geração explícita de backlog mestre. Bundle único: 10 skills atlas-* + orquestrador + 5 templates canônicos + validator subagente. Pipeline orientado a artefato com gates G1–G11.

entry.title: claude-seo
entry.content: Comprehensive SEO analysis plugin for Claude Code. 25 sub-skills (21 core + 1 orchestrator + 1 framework integration + 2 extension mirrors) and 18 sub-agents (15 core + 1 framework integration + 2 extension mirrors), plus 7 optional MCP extensions (DataForSEO, Firecrawl, Banana, Ahrefs, SE Ranking, Profound, Bing Webmaster, Unlighthouse). v2 adds shared headless rendering across every fetching agent (SPA-aware), QRG-aligned content quality gates, LCP subparts via CrUX, IndexNow submission, four explicit Schema.org generators (Reservation/OrderAction/DiscussionForumPosting/ProfilePage), AI Share-of-Voice tracking, parasite-SEO risk scanning, multi-platform portability (Cursor / Antigravity / Gemini CLI / Codex / Cline / Aider), and a hardened SSRF + DNS-rebinding canonical safety layer.

entry.title: probity
entry.content: Process discipline for AI coding agents — TDD enforcement and policies.

entry.title: aura
entry.content: Aura protocol — 12-phase audit-trail workflow for structured software development with agent coordination, beads task tracking, and vertical slice implementation

entry.title: plan-review
entry.content: Staff engineer review agent, plan-with-review skill, and resolve-dependabot skill

entry.title: claude-mem-lite
entry.content: Persistent long-term memory for Claude Code via MCP — captures coding decisions, bugfixes, and context across sessions. Hybrid FTS5 + TF-IDF search with episode batching. Single SQLite DB, no external services. A lighter, lower-cost alternative to claude-mem (episode batching + a smaller model; cost savings are an internal estimate, not a measured benchmark).

entry.title: thumbgate
entry.content: One 👎 becomes a hard rule the agent cannot bypass. Captures thumbs-down feedback, distills it into PreToolUse Pre-Action Checks, enforced across every future Claude Code session.

entry.title: alfred-agent
entry.content: Alfred Agent Workflow - messaging, coordination, ECR, and RSI for the Alfred platform

entry.title: githits
entry.content: Code examples from global open source for developers and AI assistants

entry.title: frontend-visualqa
entry.content: Local visual QA for frontends with Yutori Navigator and Playwright

entry.title: nexus-agents
entry.content: Intelligent orchestration platform for AI coding tools — routes tasks to the best model, learns from outcomes, and enforces quality through multi-model consensus. 46 MCP tools for agent management, research, memory, consensus voting, codebase intelligence, and a full dev pipeline.

entry.title: splent
entry.content: Work at SPLENT speed. Skills that author features end-to-end, set up and run products, and diagnose & fix issues — driving the splent CLI and following framework conventions (blueprints, services, repositories, hooks, tests, per-feature migrations, the feature contract, the SPL/UVL model).

entry.title: compass-mcp
entry.content: Compass real-estate access for Claude — search listings, get property details, market reports, your saved homes

entry.title: canon-core
entry.content: Always-on portable engineering rules (universal + Python tiers). A SessionStart hook injects the bundled rule modules into every session and warns loudly when a required module is missing.

entry.title: paper-trail
entry.content: Plugin Claude Code anti-hallucination pour la recherche scientifique. Cree des SOTAs (etats de l'art) garantis sans fabrication, audite les SOTAs/articles existants (purge ou warnings), avec un moteur de validation strict (FSM 8 etats + cascade d'acquisition PDF + page 1 anti-homonymie + 19 invariants de coherence). Workflow generique multi-domaines, adapter Obsidian par defaut. Sources d'acquisition etendues optionnelles, desactivees par defaut (opt-in explicite requis ; voir DISCLAIMER).

entry.title: wrg-sigma-rules
entry.content: Production-grade sigma detection rule writing, validation, and conversion for SOC analysts and threat-intel teams. LLM-assisted draft + pySigma validation + multi-backend conversion (Splunk, Elastic, Wazuh). Built on 6+ months WRG threat-intel corpus (68-rule corpus + 100+ actor TTP corpus).

entry.title: klaussy
entry.content: Claude Code boilerplate generator — scaffolds CLAUDE.md (path-scoped), namespaced .claude/skills/<repo>-<skill>/, settings, hooks, and PR template. Includes plugin-level klaussy-init and klaussy-update skills plus an MCP server.

entry.title: sentinel
entry.content: Agent-ready computer vision skills: from problem to deployed model. Claude Code, Codex, Cursor.

entry.title: lm-assist
entry.content: Observability platform for Claude Code and Agent SDK — monitor, debug, and control AI coding agents

entry.title: issue_autofix
entry.content: Autofix queued GitHub issues: branch off main, implement the smallest correct fix, conflict-check it against every other open autofix PR, gate on the project's own checks, then open a PR and label the issue. Never merges — the maintainer reviews and merges.

entry.title: claudepress
entry.content: Universal WordPress/WooCommerce starter kit: a premium art-directed design system (Terra default + 6 directions), interactive setup skill, security-first hooks, a frontend-design commit skill, a Playwright design-review hard-fail gate and Opus 4.8 agents.

entry.title: agentic-swarm
entry.content: Run large swarms of parallel Claude Code subagents safely — bounded waves, stall watchdog, resume — plus a local first-run profiler/scaffolder.

entry.title: trvl
entry.content: AI Travel Agent — 1 smart MCP tool plus 66 compatibility aliases for flights, accommodations, hotels (6 providers: Google Hotels + Trivago + Airbnb + Booking.com + Hostelworld + HomeToGo), rental cars, trains, buses, ferries (20 ground providers incl. 8 ferry operators + night-train specialists European Sleeper & Snälltåget), 37 travel hack detectors, award sweet-spot scanning, traveller profile with email history learning, deals, price alerts, and destination intel. Free, no API keys required.

entry.title: vigiles
entry.content: Verify CLAUDE.md/AGENTS.md references, compile typed specs, and test the agent harness

entry.title: sig
entry.content: Disciplined AI development workflow integrating GSD's execution orchestration, Agent Skills' quality enforcement, and patterns from the broader Claude Code plugin ecosystem — with a project-complexity calibration router that right-sizes rigor per project tier. Slash-command prefix: /sig:* (Signal is the project brand; sig is the namespace).

entry.title: vibemate
entry.content: Vibemate unified AI coding agent plugin

entry.title: skill-forge
entry.content: Self-improving intelligence amplifier: 16 behavioral skills + autonomous discovery + TF-IDF routing + SkillOpt self-improvement loop. Use for systematic debugging, code review, project orchestration, architecture decisions, error resilience, and web performance.

entry.title: odin
entry.content: ODIN (Outline Driven INtelligence) - Advanced code agent with diagram-first engineering and atomic commit workflows for surgical precision in software development

entry.title: clickup
entry.content: ClickUp CLI with 25 agent skills covering the full API -- token-efficient alternative to MCP with chat, time tracking, docs, and project management workflows

entry.title: go-bananas
entry.content: Skills for building server-side-rendered web apps with the go-bananas framework: scaffolding, the middleware chain, authentication (the Authenticator seam + OIDC), and secrets/keys.

entry.title: codeforge
entry.content: + CFP-2440 (2026-06-28) — reconcile-overlay 워크플로 ongoing-sync 채널 신설 (Phase 2): templates/github-workflows/ → .github/workflows 이중 채널 동기화 A1 channel-parameterization. (1) env seam CONSUMER_ROOT / WORKFLOW_SRC_DIR / WORKFLOW_DST_DIR 신설 + L478 inline CONSUMER_ROOT 참조 치환(INV-B) (2) _reconcile_file 파라미터화 src_base/dest_base 추가 + 3개 호출처 명시전달 (3) 메인루프 채널배열(overlay|workflow) 일반화 + safe-degrade 채널부재(source 불요) (4) _create_snapshot multi-root化(root+rels 인자) + rollback 치환(CONSUMER_ROOT 추출) (5) result-fidelity 워크플로채널 2차 호출(aggregator 동일 구조 반복) (6) L778 idempotency early-exit AND-합성(양채널동시 no-op 만 조조종료). change-plan §3 정확 구현·부호결함 0·overlay회귀검증완. 신규 ADR 0 / required 신설 0 / branch protection 6-tuple 무변경. 6.44.0 → 6.45.0 MINOR (CFP-2440 Phase2 workflow-channel 활성화 = 신규 consumer 배포거버넌스, ADR-037(d)). marketplace version sync(ADR-063). + CFP-2445 (2026-06-28) — DomainAgent financial-invariant-0 조건부 sonnet Phase 2 enforcement (ADR-042 Amendment 17, CFP-2432 follow-up): Amd16 §결정3 이 예약한 DomainAgent flip 자리를 선결충족 후 채움. DomainAgent sonnet flip 조건 = (4-AND low-stakes) AND (financial-invariant-0 shape) 2-predicate AND — financial-invariant-0 = stakes 4-AND 와 orthogonal 한 financial-correctness 결과접촉 축의 별 predicate(STAKES_FINANCIAL_INVARIANT_ZERO). DomainAgent 가 백테스트 결과 숫자(equity/PnL/position/체결가/universe/파라미터)를 생성·변형·해석하지 않을 때만 financial invariant 해석 표면 0(sonnet cover), 데이터·엔진·전략 접촉 시 opus 보존. 신규 consumer-facing surface — (D1) docs/domain-knowledge/domain/backtesting-discipline/financial-correctness-invariant-catalog.md (11 invariant INV-1~11 + A/B 분류(정적 falsifiable/프로세스·메타데이터) + 7 Sins 1:1 traceability + F1 survivorship 1.4% 정정 + F2 storytelling/outliers 편입, DomainAgent write 권한 경로) + scripts/check-stakes-tier-gating.sh STAKES_FINANCIAL_INVARIANT_ZERO predicate + DomainAgent 분기(2-predicate AND, fail-safe 동형, InfraOpArch 동작 무변경) + tests/scripts/test-check-stakes-tier-gating.sh DomainAgent truth-table D1~D6 + regression + mutation RED 2종(생존 0) + docs/project-config-schema.md + docs/consumer-guide.md §1m-2 story_stakes DomainAgent 확장(conservative_override) + docs/orchestrator-playbook.md §3.0.12a DomainAgent spawn-전 외부 shape 판정 분기(§1 원문 + directive 경로 키워드, §4.1 미존재 닭-달걀 회피) + skills/deputy-mandate/SKILL.md DomainAgent stakes 분기 각주 + docs/domain-knowledge/concept/stakes-gated-model-tier-baseline.md F1 protocol DomainAgent baseline 확장(도메인 invariant 식별 완결성, financial-invariant-zero-evidence: marker). DomainAgent.md frontmatter model:opus 값 무변경(fail-safe default 보존, GATE-1) + conditional 주석 + 본문 mandate 표면 재정의(§결정2 invariant, 순수 model downgrade 금지). 메커니즘 신설 0(opts.model override + 4-AND + clamp + F1 protocol 재사용). lane plugin sibling = codeforge-requirements 0.10.0(DomainAgent mandate 재정의). 신규 ADR 0(ADR-042 Amendment 17) / required 신설 0 / branch protection 6-tuple 무변경(ADR-127 ratchet). 6.43.0 → 6.44.0 MINOR (신규 consumer-facing governance surface = ADR-037 (d)). marketplace version sync(ADR-063). + CFP-2439 (2026-06-27) — bootstrap-consumer 워크플로 copy whitelist 구동 전환(초기 onboarding): 고정 7종 배열 → templates/scripts/consumer_applicable_workflows.txt(30 entry) whitelist iterate. 신규 whitelisted 게이트(CFP-2434 placement 등)가 신규 consumer onboarding 에 자동배포. AC-4 degrade=whitelist 부재/parse-0종 시 고정 7종 fallback+WARN+non-abort(ADR-116 never-reduce, 0종 fail-closed 아님). .ps1 parity(AC-7). copy source templates/github-workflows/ 무변경. reconcile(ongoing sync) 워크플로 갭은 분리 follow-up #2440. 신규 ADR 0 / required 신설 0 / branch protection 6-tuple 무변경. 6.42.0 → 6.43.0 MINOR (6.42.0=CFP-2432 #2443 병렬 세션 선점 → 6.43.0 회피). marketplace sync(ADR-063). + CFP-2432 (2026-06-27) — Story-shape 조건부 model tier Phase 2 enforcement (ADR-042 Amendment 16): low-stakes 4-AND shape(실자금 없음 ∧ production cutover 없음 ∧ 신규 신뢰경계 없음 ∧ live 외부 API 호출 없음)에서 InfraOperationalArchitectAgent opus→sonnet spawn-time override 발효 guardrail. 신규 consumer-facing surface — (F-7) scripts/check-stakes-tier-gating.sh (4-AND 판정 + max(floor,overlay) clamp 결정론 SSOT, discriminating test 8 truth-table + 3 trust-boundary row RED→GREEN 변별) + (F-3) overlay/hooks/check_bootstrap.py check 11/strict (f) story_stakes overlay down-tier 거부(확장-only schema-gate, ADR-127 §결정6) + docs/project-config-schema.md story_stakes 블록(conservative_override + down-tier 금지) + docs/consumer-guide.md §1m-2 + docs/orchestrator-playbook.md §3.0.12a gating 배선 + skills/deputy-mandate/SKILL.md InfraOpArch row stakes 분기 각주 + (F1) docs/domain-knowledge/concept/stakes-gated-model-tier-baseline.md (sonnet≥opus baseline 측정 4-step + opus 복원 trigger 3-임계, AC-9) + evidence-checks-registry stakes-tier-flip-evidence entry(warning-tier). frontmatter model:opus = fail-safe default(override 누락=opus, 현행 무변경). 메커니즘 신설 0(opts.model override 재사용, ADR-057 §결정4). lane plugin sibling = codeforge-design 0.29.0(InfraOpArch 주석) + codeforge-requirements 0.9.1(ChangeImpact sonnet 비준). 신규 ADR 0 / required 신설 0 / branch protection 6-tuple 무변경(ADR-127 ratchet). 6.41.1 → 6.42.0 MINOR (신규 consumer-facing governance surface = ADR-037 (d)). marketplace version sync(ADR-063). + CFP-2433 (2026-06-27) — drift-check codex 매핑 decouple + superpowers 제거 (ADR-037 §A1-2 Amendment 3): scripts/check-codeforge-version-drift.sh 의 PLUGIN_MARKETPLACE 매핑이 marketplace registry name 과 GitHub source repo path 를 conflate 해 codex 엔트리([codex]=openai-codex/marketplace)가 404 repo 를 가리켜 codex 실 drift(installed 1.0.4 < latest 1.0.5)를 silent masking. 정정 = registry-name↔source-repo decouple — MARKETPLACE_REPO override 맵([openai-codex]=openai/codex-plugin-cc) 신설 + marketplace_version() 안에서만 consult(installed_version()/install hint 의 ${mp%/marketplace} cache-key 파생 무손상 = AC-5 codex cache 좌표 openai-codex/codex 보존). superpowers 엔트리([superpowers]=claude-plugins-official/marketplace) 제거(CFP-2249/ADR-122 의존 0 + 실 source .version 부재 → 고쳐도 fetch-failed = 제거 대상). 주석 카운트 정정(11→10 entry, 9→10 plugin = codeforge 9 + codex). ADR-037 §A1-2 Amendment 3 fact-correction(결정 내용 무변경 — codex/superpowers family invariant scope 제외 결정 보존, carrier prose 의 wrong codex repo 매핑 + superpowers 제거 + stale 9-plugin/family-7 count 만 정정). drift script self-test 신설(MARKETPLACE_REPO override resolution + superpowers 부재 + AC-5 cache 무손상 discriminating fixture). 신규 ADR 0 / required 신설 0 / branch protection 6-tuple 무변경. 6.40.0 → 6.40.1 PATCH (script behavior 정정 = silent false-negative → 정확 보고, 의도 동작 복원). marketplace version sync(ADR-063). + CFP-2434 (2026-06-27) — placement 게이트 consumer-applicable화 (Epic CFP-2418 deferred 배선 closure): CFP-2422 책임 배치 메타불변식 게이트(responsibility-topology-check.yml, L2 책임→레포) + CFP-2428 marker drift 게이트(responsibility-marker-drift-check.yml, L1 코드→책임) 가 consumer-applicability whitelist(consumer_applicable_workflows.txt) + closure manifest(consumer-scripts.manifest) 에 미등재 → wrapper(단일 repo, repo_topology 부재 → fail-open PASS)에서만 실행 = consumer PR 실작동 0 (목적 미달성). 본 Story 가 그 배포 배선을 닫음 — whitelist += 2 basename + manifest += 4 closure entry(.sh thin wrapper 2 + .py SSOT lib 2, ADR-130 §결정3/5 closure-완전성) + 4 asset chmod 100755(Check 4 exec-bit, .sh/.py 비면제) atomic. 게이트 본체(yml/sh/py) 무변경 — 순수 배포 closure(등재만). fail-open layer 분리(ADR-131 §결정2)로 repo_topology 미주입 consumer 는 공백 PASS layer = 전-consumer 배포 안전. 3-way 일관성 게이트(CFP-2412 whitelist-manifest-3way) 4면 PASS + Check 4 manifest lint PASS 실측. 신규 ADR 0(ADR-083/130/131 직접 적용). required 신설 0 / branch protection 6-tuple 무변경(ADR-127 ratchet). 6.40.0 → 6.41.0 MINOR (신규 consumer 배포 거버넌스 behavior 추가 = ADR-037 (d)). marketplace version sync(ADR-063). + CFP-2426 (2026-06-26) — lane-count SSOT 일관성 게이트 신설 (ADR-060 Amendment 19 §결정 33): canonical 작업레인 수(10, ADR-125 Amendment 1)가 governance 문서 전반에서 단조 유지되는지 grep-기반 mechanical 검출 (warning-tier). 현재-상태 lane-count 단언(N 레인 / N번째 lane / 레인 N개, N≠10) 가 canonical=10 과 어긋나면 FLAG + 5축 allowlist(within-line 이중토큰 / negation / history / path / counterfactual) false-positive 차단. same-file channel-split: live description:/section: 값 = 검출 / date:/source_section:/amendment_log span = 면제. amendment_log span = line-local boolean toggle(enter=헤더 key / exit=dedent·다음 top-level key), multi-line regex 0(ReDoS-safe). check_lane_count_ssot.py Python SSOT(line-by-line ReDoS-safe anchored bounded-quantifier regex) + thin wrapper + .github single-root workflow(warning-tier continue-on-error) + self-contained discriminating test(22 fixture + 4 mutation 생존 0). evidence-checks-registry append(warning-tier, 17번째 warning-tier entry lane-count-ssot-consistency) + plugin.json tagline lane-count 8→10 genuine STALE 정정. 신규 ADR 0(ADR-060 Amendment 19 §결정 33 framework entry). required 신설 0 / branch protection 6-tuple 무변경 (ADR-127 ratchet). 6.38.0 → 6.40.0 MINOR (신규 governance lint gate 활성화 = governance behavior, ADR-037 (d); 6.39.0 = CFP-2428 #2430 병렬 세션 선점 → 6.40.0 회피). marketplace version sync(ADR-063). + CFP-2428 (2026-06-26) — declared-marker layer(L1 코드→책임) drift 게이트 신설 (Epic CFP-2418 deferred FU, ADR-131 Amendment 1): CFP-2422 메타불변식 게이트(L2 책임→레포)의 sibling layer. 멀티레포 consumer overlay project.yaml 의 repo_topology.responsibility_markers[] 섹션(docs/project-config-schema.md sibling 신설)을 읽어, 선언마커(L1)가 토폴로지(L2 responsibilities[]) 및 파일시스템(L3)과 transitive 일관성을 유지하는지 구조적으로만 대조하는 warning-tier CI gate. join-key = responsibility byte-identical 동일 namespace (L1·L2 묶는 유일 연결고리). drift 3종 (exit 1, continue-on-error 비차단): (a)unmarked(L2 책임 R 이 L1 manifest 에 entry 0 = set-diff topology − markers ≠ ∅) + (b)불일치(repo 지정 marker entry 의 marker.repo ≠ topology.owner_repo[R] = 문자열 동등; repo 미지정 entry 는 비대상 = 역방향 추론 안 함) + (c)stale(marker entry path/glob 이 fs 에 부재 = os.path.exists / glob.glob 0건, offline-first fs-stat gh 0). 역방향 고아(marker 에만 있고 topology 에 없는 R) = ::notice:: 만 (warning 아님, drift 카운트 0). layer 분리 fail-open (ADR-131 §결정2 동형 — ADR-130 fail-closed 와 다른 LAYER): repo_topology 미주입 / applicable!=true / markers 미주입·빈맵 = 정책값 공백 layer = entry.title: rules-as-tests
entry.content: Rules-as-Tests: turn any codebase convention into an executable test that fails at the earliest reachable channel. Skills, sub-agents, session hooks + an opt-in command to wire git-hook/CI enforcement into your repo.

entry.title: loopprint
entry.content: Interactive wizard that turns a vague goal into a runnable loop blueprint — durable state, an external verifier, stop conditions, and maker != checker. Decision gate, pattern library, and a generated, self-linted artifact package.

entry.title: biff-dev
entry.content: UNIX-style team communication for Claude Code: /who, /finger, /plan, /write, /read, /mesg, /tty, /last, /wall, /talk

entry.title: hyperframes
entry.content: HyperFrames by HeyGen. Write HTML, render video. Compositions, GSAP and runtime adapter animations, captions, voiceovers, audio-reactive visuals, and website-to-video capture for HyperFrames.

entry.title: drt-hub
entry.content: Skills for drt — Reverse ETL for the code-first data stack

entry.title: kmgraph
entry.content: Structured knowledge capture, lesson-learned documentation, and cross-session memory for Claude Code projects. Includes KG entries, ADRs, meta-issue tracking, chat extraction, and profile-file rule capture.

entry.title: ivalt-agent-auth
entry.content: Human-in-the-loop biometric approval with PKI-signed attestation. Pauses an agent at a sensitive step, pushes to the approver's phone for FaceID/fingerprint approval, and returns a signed attestation (biometric + location + time + device).

entry.title: openair-3-mcp-client-plugin-oss
entry.content: openair MCP harness — manuals, workflow recipes, multi-MCP bridge. Pair with openair-3-mcp-server-oss v0.2+.

entry.title: dfos
entry.content: Install, configure, and use the DFOS protocol CLI: identities, content chains, credentials, services, and relays.

entry.title: creative-skills
entry.content: Creative skills including SVG animation and design

entry.title: hamakom-leads
entry.content: המקום לידים — בריף לידים ועורך בוקר ל'המקום הכי חם בגיהנום', ישירות מ-osint-db (חדשות מ-33 מקורות + רשומות ממשלתיות חדשות). מדרג לפי DNA, מחבר חדשות↔דאטה, ומצב פיץ' עומק. האיסוף ב-osint-db (פלאגין hamakom-osint); כאן הבחירה והדירוג.

entry.title: biookf
entry.content: BioOKF: curate, visualize, and reason over biomedical Open Knowledge Format bundles. Bundles the bokf MCP server (curation + analysis + live BioOKF Studio GUI control), the bokf CLI, and the prebuilt BioOKF Studio desktop app. The Studio is shipped precompiled; the first run downloads the binaries for your platform from GitHub Releases, so no local compile is required.

entry.title: genvid-skills
entry.content: Genvid reference skill pack — teaches any MCP-capable agent to drive the Genvid governed boundary.

entry.title: tidal-diagram-skills
entry.content: Build diagrams in the Tidal Diagrams app from a prompt, and export them to Figma as editable layers.

entry.title: cursor-acp-bridge
entry.content: MCP server that drives cursor-agent over the Agent Client Protocol (ACP): delegate coding tasks to Cursor from Claude Code, with auto-approved writes and clarifying questions surfaced via elicitation.

entry.title: radiology
entry.content: Medical-imaging tooling references: DICOM via DCMTK, the Orthanc REST API, and 3D Slicer.

entry.title: pact-agents
entry.content: 24 Pact/KDA-CE skills, 16 instructions, 20 slash commands, 1 security agent, and CI scripts for Kadena smart contract development.

entry.title: gen-image
entry.content: Generate one or more educational/explanatory images from a text prompt via the gen-image CLI and return ready-to-paste image links. For explicit, user-requested generation (single or batch).

entry.title: coding
entry.content: Software engineering workflows: commits, reviews, refactoring, and language idioms.

entry.title: skill-creator-enhanced
entry.content: Create, fork, evaluate, and iteratively improve Claude skills. Forks Anthropic's skill-creator with built-in guidance on composability, layered tooling, deterministic scripts, and a self-update compounding loop.

entry.title: archmantic
entry.content: Query a grounded architecture model of your codebase over MCP — capability map, diagrams, data model, API surface, dependencies — instead of reading whole files. ~98% fewer tokens; every answer grounded to file:line. Ships a skill so your agent reaches for it automatically.

entry.title: hamakom-desk
entry.content: ניהול מערכת ואסטרטגיה ל'המקום הכי חם בגיהנום' — סנכרון וורדפרס↔נושן (hamakom-investigations-sync), ליינאפ שבועי (hamakom-weekly-lineup), ניוזלטר שבועי (hamakom-weekly-newsletter), וניתוח DNA מערכתי ופערי סיקור (site-strategist).

entry.title: ship
entry.content: Ship code changes with a structured git workflow: add, commit, pull --rebase, push

entry.title: appstore-precheck
entry.content: Read-only iOS App Store pre-submission check: scans 20 rejection vectors, wraps Apple's fastlane precheck, watches guideline drift, and runs an adversarial reviewer pass before you submit.

entry.title: harness
entry.content: Portable read-only advisor agents, profile-driven PR/ticket skills, enforcement hooks, and a self-adapting /harness-init that tailors any repo to a documented index pattern.

entry.title: cad-drafting
entry.content: CAD drafting skills for Claude Code — survey/cadastral geometry intelligence, DXF generation, layer/ObjectData standards, and package validation conventions.

entry.title: ambience
entry.content: AI-assisted authoring and diagnosis for Ambience (Home Assistant) scene configuration. Bundles the ambience-author skill and the /ambience-create and /ambience-fix commands.

entry.title: chrome-devtools-mcp
entry.content: Reliable automation, in-depth debugging, and performance analysis in Chrome using Chrome DevTools and Puppeteer

entry.title: agent-skills
entry.content: Portable skills in the open Agent Skills (SKILL.md) standard.

entry.title: searchfit-seo
entry.content: AI-powered SEO toolkit customized for ha-makom.co.il — Hebrew (RTL) news SEO for an Israeli investigative-journalism site on WordPress + Yoast. Audit, plan content, optimize articles, generate NewsArticle schema, cluster Hebrew keywords, and track AI visibility. Based on the free SearchFit.ai toolkit.

entry.title: lightbridge
entry.content: Personal workflow conventions — bootstrap and manage the .lightbridge/ per-repo config namespace.

entry.title: hamakom-visuals
entry.content: נכסי המדיה הוויזואליים של 'המקום הכי חם בגיהנום' — גרפיקות כתבה (hamakom-graphic), קרוסלות אינסטגרם (hamakom-carousel), ורילים (hamakom-reel). עיצוב מותג אחיד: NextExit + Narkiss Tam, אדום #f70d28.

entry.title: clawcast
entry.content: Turns what your Claude Code agents build into a daily two-host podcast. A SessionEnd + debounced Stop hook generate your episode locally and ship ONLY the finished script (never raw transcripts) to clawcast.fm.

entry.title: rule-trace
entry.content: Make AI-agent rule application visible and auditable: stable rule IDs, a catalog, response-time trace blocks, cross-session usage counters, severity + waiver semantics, and a deterministic validator that guards catalog/heading correspondence and importer drift.

entry.title: humanise
entry.content: Strip LLM 'tells' from output. Steers prose to read human-written and deterministically cleans em dashes, smart quotes, emojis, and AI-overused words from any file Claude writes.

entry.title: promptdown-docs
entry.content: Base de conhecimento do projeto promptdown-ui-v3: SPA vanilla, design system dark minimalista, backend mock e setup multi-agente.

entry.title: hamakom-factcheck
entry.content: המקום פאקטצ'ק — אימות עבור 'המקום הכי חם בגיהנום': תוכן ויראלי ומקור ראשוני (hamakom-factcheck), נתונים וסטטיסטיקה (-data), ציטוטים וייחוס (-quote), גיאולוקיישן וזמן (-geo), פורנזיקת תמונה/וידאו (-visual), ואימות כתבה לפני פרסום בלי עריכת טקסט (hamakom-article-verify). חלק מסקילי הנתונים/ציטוטים נשענים על osint-db (פלאגין hamakom-osint).

entry.title: memex-checkout
entry.content: Memex spec-checkout — binds your coding thread to a Spec and records in-flow edits against it (claim-gated, privacy-first). Non-blocking, opt-in, uninstallable any time. Sends only changed file paths + the claimed spec; never source code or prompts.

entry.title: ai-instruction-kits-core
entry.content: AI指示書キットのコアスキル（安全なコミット等）

entry.title: gen-suno
entry.content: Write Suno-ready song lyrics and generate the audio via the gen-suno CLI. Two modes: one-off songs about any topic, or a chained prerequisite album engineered for memorization with clearly-enunciated, intelligible vocals.

entry.title: hamakom-osint
entry.content: המקום אוסינט — תחקיר מעל מסד ה-OSINT הממשלתי של 'המקום הכי חם בגיהנום': פטורים ממכרז (osint-exemptions), תיק ישות מצולב (osint-entity-dossier), לידים יומיים (osint-daily-leads), כנסת (osint-knesset), תכנון (osint-planning), ותכנון יו"ש (osint-yosh-planning). כולל את שרת ה-MCP המרוחק osint-db (5 כלים: list_tables, describe_table, query_db, search_entity, new_since).

entry.title: hyperframes
entry.content: HyperFrames by HeyGen. Write HTML, render video. Compositions, GSAP and runtime adapter animations, captions, voiceovers, audio-reactive visuals, and website-to-video capture for HyperFrames.

entry.title: clairvoyance
entry.content: A force multiplier for agent-to-human handoffs, turning work into evidence-backed decisions humans can trust.

entry.title: gipity

entry.title: ultra-explainer

entry.title: core-standards

entry.title: pair-goal

entry.title: api-standards

Auto-invoke: nestjs + code-quality standards, cross-stack-contracts (active when craft.json stacks has 2+ entries: unified error shape, cursor pagination, Bearer header standard, versioned routes), websockets (conditional on socket.io/ws usage: connection auth, backoff reconnect, event enum, schema versioning). db-migrations workflow (Prisma schema → migration → client regeneration).

entry.title: flutter-standards

Pair with mobile-standards for craft-guide, production-readiness, forms, and observability.

entry.title: web-standards
entry.content: Web pack — Next.js + Tailwind + shadcn. Auto-invoke: nextjs + production-readiness (§R1–§R10) + craft-guide (§1–§15) standards; premium-signals (market-sourced precise values — shadow formula, OKLCH dark grays, easing, tabular-nums); taste (metric dials: DESIGN_VARIANCE/MOTION_INTENSITY/VISUAL_DENSITY, AI-tells forbidden list); i18n (conditional on next-i18next/react-i18next or locales/ dir). Audit commands delegate to core-standards:verify-changes. extract-tokens writes token source of truth. Platform-agnostic design skills (accessibility, information-architecture, aesthetic-coherence) moved to design-standards plugin.
